'''rarocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidome|cnidome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidome|cnidome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rarocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rærecheth|rærecheth]] || [[word:rærechej|rærechej]] || [[word:rærechesh|rærechesh]] || [[word:ræreche|ræreche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rarorochoth|rarorochoth]] || [[word:rarorochoj|rarorochoj]] || [[word:rarorochosh|rarorochosh]] || [[word:rarorocho|rarorocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rarochoth|rarochoth]] || [[word:rarochoj|rarochoj]] || [[word:rarochosh|rarochosh]] || [[word:rarocho|rarocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rarofchoth|rarofchoth]] || [[word:rarofchoj|rarofchoj]] || [[word:rarofchosh|rarofchosh]] || [[word:rarofchof|rarofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rarochotho|rarochotho]] || [[word:rarochojo|rarochojo]] || [[word:rarochosho|rarochosho]] || [[word:rarochoko|rarochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rarochoth|rarochoth]] || [[word:rarochoj|rarochoj]] || [[word:rarochosh|rarochosh]] || [[word:rarocho|rarocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rarochothol|rarochothol]] || [[word:rarochojol|rarochojol]] || [[word:rarochoshol|rarochoshol]] || [[word:rarochokol|rarochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rarochothotho|rarochothotho]] || [[word:rarochojojo|rarochojojo]] || [[word:rarochoshosho|rarochoshosho]] || [[word:rarochoko|rarochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rarochothon|rarochothon]] || [[word:rarochojon|rarochojon]] || [[word:rarochoshon|rarochoshon]] || [[word:rarochokon|rarochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rarochothoro|rarochothoro]] || [[word:rarochojoro|rarochojoro]] || [[word:rarochoshoro|rarochoshoro]] || [[word:rarochokoro|rarochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
